tasks.title: Follow up with Alex on appliance pricing

steps.subject: Quick question on outbound stack
steps.body: Hi {{name}} — saw {{company}} is scaling outbound. We run Creator + Outreach Claw on bare metal with zero SaaS rent. Worth a 10-min look?

steps.subject: Re: sovereign outbound
steps.body: Following up — happy to share how we pause sequences on reply and keep CRM on-appliance.

steps.subject: CurXor for {{company}}
steps.body: Hi {{name}} — local LLM drafts sequences; eno2 bridge sends mail. No cloud CRM bill.

steps.subject: How is everything?
steps.body:
Hi {{name}},

Hope your order arrived well — let me know if you need anything.

steps.subject: Review request
steps.body:
Hi,

If you have a moment, a review would really help my shop.

steps.subject: Last note
steps.body: Closing the loop — if timing is off, no worries. Reply anytime if sovereign outbound becomes a priority.
